mark_scheme.accept_en: Line B (refraction toward normal entering glass) and direction from laser into glass.
mark_scheme.accept_zh: B 线（光进入玻璃时折向法线）+ 方向从激光射进玻璃。
mark_scheme.reject_en: Any other line, or direction from glass out to laser.
mark_scheme.reject_zh: 其他线，或方向从玻璃射回激光。
mark_scheme.ignore_en: Minor inaccuracies in line position are not graded.
mark_scheme.ignore_zh: 线条位置轻微偏差不计。
